content.hint: 学生需要回答实际课堂中的应用价值
content.scenarioHint: 教授或同行提出质疑，学生需回答
content.knowledgePoint: 表达实际应用价值的句型
content.responseTemplate: This seems super niche—how's this useful in real ___?

content.hint: 强调设计初衷是解决资源有限的现实问题，而非依赖理想条件

blanks.answer: it simplifies instruction so teachers can manage even with limited resources
options: it requires expensive equipment that most schools can't afford
it simplifies instruction so teachers can manage even with limited resources
we only tested it in elite schools
it works only if students are already high achievers

content.situation: 在学术会议上，一位听众质疑你的教育技术研究只适用于特定环境，无法推广到普通学校。
content.speakerText: This feels too specific to pilot schools—how can it work in regular classrooms with larger classes and less support?
content.speakerTextCn: 这看起来只适合试点学校——在班级更大、支持更少的普通课堂里，它怎么行得通？
content.knowledgePoint: 用设计初衷证明普适性
content.responseTemplate: It’s built for exactly that context—___

content.hint: 回答教授或同行的质疑
content.scenarioHint: 教授或同行提出质疑，学生需回答
content.responseTemplate: 你认为这个研究能用在_____吗？我们的数据都是_____。

content.hint: 强调底层机制的可迁移性，而非表面形式的完全一致

blanks.answer: it focuses on engagement patterns that transcend educational levels
options: it only works with teenagers because they’re more compliant
it focuses on engagement patterns that transcend educational levels
we haven’t tried it at all in higher education
college students don’t need structured interventions

content.situation: 一位同行质疑你的教学干预模型只针对K-12，问是否适用于大学教学环境。
content.speakerText: Your model is based on adolescent learners—do the same strategies apply to college students?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的模型基于青少年学习者，这些策略对大学生也适用吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 展示核心原理的可迁移性

content.hint: 聚焦教师日常最真实的痛点，而非抽象或理想化的需求

blanks.answer: the challenge of keeping students engaged with minimal preparation time
options: the challenge of keeping students engaged with minimal preparation time
the need for more standardized testing
the requirement to use advanced technology in every lesson
the lack of funding for extracurricular activities

content.situation: 一位教育管理者担心你的研究缺乏实际落地价值，问它能否解决真实教学中的普遍困难。
content.speakerText: This sounds interesting, but what real problem does it solve that teachers face every day?
content.speakerTextCn: 这听起来不错，但它解决了教师每天面临的什么实际问题？

content.hint: 这是简洁有力的回应，强调该方法在大型项目失效时的优势
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用搭配（big programs fail）
